name: Oblong Wood Block Floral Decorative Throw Pillow Camel/Mauve - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Rayon & Linen, Indoor Use
description: This Oblong Wood-Block Floral Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee adds a lovely finishing touch to your sofa, chair, or bedspread. This decorative pillow is adorned with floral motifs in shades of camel and mauve on a cream backdrop to lend some garden-inspired appeal to your interior space. Featuring a soft fabric-blend exterior and a well-filled interior, the rectangular throw pillow adds the right amount of comfort and style, whether you want to unwind after a long day of work or simply need an eye-catching focal point in your room.
